refnamediv.refpurpose: Apply fixed, Otsu, or Triangle thresholding.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [out, level] = imthreshold(image) [out, level] = imthreshold(image, level, mode) [out, level] = imthreshold(image, level, mode, maxValue)

listitem.para: A grayscale or RGB image. RGB input is converted to grayscale.
A normalized fixed threshold in the range 0 to 1. It is ignored by automatic modes.
binary, binary_inv, trunc, tozero, tozero_inv, otsu, or triangle. The default is otsu.
Output value used by binary modes, from 0 to 255. The default is 255.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imthreshold is the general numeric thresholding API. It uses OpenCV after converting the input to uint8, supports binary and non-binary modes, and returns a uint8 image. Fixed levels and returned levels use a class-independent 0-to-1 scale. Use imbinarize when the desired result is a boolean mask.

refsection.title: Examples
